title: Sabo Reveals the Truth of the Levely
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Vivi, Wapol as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I think it was King Wapol...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: > Hey, Wapol!! How much further are you gonna go?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As far as it takes!! I'll run to the ends of the world if I have to!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, darling! I've been looking for you!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Sounds good to me! Let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Where the Devil Have You Been?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And who is that young lady with you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you're running away with a mistress?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eloping to start a life on the run?!

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 21 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
